summary: Hamilton's arrival injects fresh momentum into Ferrari's title fight as the Scuderia seeks to capitalize on his confidence-building victory in Spain. McLaren's midfield gains threaten to splinter the constructors' battle, forcing both championship contenders to execute flawless strategy amid unpredictable Spa weather. A strong result here could crystallize Ferrari's momentum heading into the season's second half or expose whether Hamilton's spark proves sustainable under genuine pressure.
